title: Change dashboard widget status colour
excerpt: It would be great if you could change the status colour widget on the dashboard. It is currently blue for on track. It would be great if it mirrored the colours chosen by a user on their board.

posts.author: RMBA (Charlotte K)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if you could change the status colour widget on the dashboard. It is currently blue for on track. It would be great if it mirrored the colours chosen by a user on their board.
